title: Canyons 100K Crew Guide
subtitle: 16h36 expected plan. Crew arrivals include a 45-minute buffer. Bags are labeled by aid station; bring the matching bag to each crew stop.
versionNote: Version: Pantoll-calibrated expected pace, 16h36 schedule. Next pass: exact maps, parking screenshots, and product-specific fuel math.

crewStops.name: Michigan Bluff
crewStops.crewNote: Park on Chicken Hawk Rd only; no Michigan Bluff Rd parking and no parking past the Chicken Hawk intersection. Walk in about 1/2 mile.

crewStops.name: Foresthill
crewStops.crewNote: No parking on Church St, in front of businesses/residences, or in front of the school.

crewStops.name: Drivers Flat
crewStops.crewNote: Park on Foresthill Rd or roadside; main lot requires a fee. Walk in about 1/2 mile on Drivers Flat Rd; no parking or waiting there.

stops.name: China Wall Start
stops.note: Runner-only shuttle. Leave with the first long-leg fuel loaded.

stops.name: Deadwood 1
stops.note: Refill and keep enough food for the Devils Thumb loop through Deadwood 2.

stops.name: Devils Thumb 1
stops.note: Water/electrolyte only. No food. Keep moving unless bottles are low.

stops.name: Swinging Bridge
stops.note: Reset for the steep climb back to Devils Thumb.

stops.name: Devils Thumb 2
stops.note: Top off if needed. Food still comes from what you carried out of Deadwood 1.

stops.name: Deadwood 2
stops.note: Refill for the push to first crew. Start heat management early.

stops.name: Michigan Bluff
stops.crewCallout: CREW HERE: arrive by 10:58 AM. Use the Michigan Bluff bag and follow the official crew parking directions.

stops.name: Foresthill
stops.crewCallout: CREW HERE: arrive by 12:33 PM. Use the Foresthill bag/drop bag and follow the official crew parking directions.

stops.name: Cal 2
stops.note: Long no-crew leg follows. Refill hard here.

stops.name: Drivers Flat
stops.crewCallout: CREW HERE: arrive by 4:54 PM. Use the Drivers Flat bag and follow the official crew parking directions.

stops.name: Mammoth Bar
stops.note: Eat if possible. The finish is close enough to simplify, not close enough to stop fueling.

stops.name: Confluence
stops.note: Final aid. Calories, fluid, then climb to Auburn.

stops.name: Downtown Auburn Finish
stops.note: Warm layer, dry shoes, simple food, and no complicated decisions.

crewCheatSheet.name: Michigan Bluff
crewCheatSheet.detail: Use the labeled Michigan Bluff bag. Park on Chicken Hawk Rd only, then walk in about 1/2 mile.

crewCheatSheet.name: Foresthill
crewCheatSheet.detail: Use the labeled Foresthill bag/drop bag. No Church St, business, residence, or school-front parking.

crewCheatSheet.name: Drivers Flat
crewCheatSheet.detail: Use the labeled Drivers Flat bag. Park on Foresthill Rd or roadside, then walk in about 1/2 mile.

maps.name: Michigan Bluff
maps.detail: Crew allowed. Park on Chicken Hawk Rd only; no parking beyond the Michigan Bluff Rd / Chicken Hawk Rd intersection.
maps.offlineGuideImageAlt: Official runner guide parking map for Michigan Bluff crew access.

maps.name: Foresthill
maps.detail: Crew and drop bag. No parking on Church St, in front of businesses/residences, or in front of Foresthill School.
maps.offlineGuideImageAlt: Official runner guide parking map for Foresthill crew access.

maps.name: Drivers Flat
maps.detail: Last crew stop. Park on Foresthill Rd or roadside; no parking or waiting on Drivers Flat Rd or the staging area.
maps.offlineGuideImageAlt: Official runner guide parking map for Drivers Flat crew access.
